question: Who will win this Formula 1 race: {home_team} or {away_team}?
_comment: F1 Race sessions — normalized events must set home_team/away_team to the two answer identities (e.g. drivers or constructors). Filter to session_type Race in the parser.

question: Which driver takes the chequered flag first: {home_team} or {away_team}?
_comment: Same mapping as f1_race_winner_head_to_head; wording variant for race winner.

question: Will {home_team} win this Grand Prix race?
_comment: Requires home_team to be the driver or constructor the question names; away_team unused for yes/no but may still be set by the normalizer.

question: Will {home_team} finish ahead of {away_team} in this race?
_comment: Head-to-head race outcome; both placeholders should be drivers (or comparable entities) for the same Race event.
